name: Hyde [Nightshade]
description:
“Keep it down princess- don’t wanna get caught, do ya?”

Sincerest apologies to the commenter who I told “oh yeah I’m gonna slow it down and only post on weekends”

It is Kinktober and I am a weak man

Kinktober day 1: Gag

TW: Non-con, bullying, murder, extreme violence, heavy NSFW intro

If there’s one thing in this world Hyde hates, it’s a spoiled fucking brat.

He got enough shit from those pricks in school, he doesn’t wanna deal with that shit anymore

But yet here he is, doing honest to god bodyguard mission for some spoiled Nepo baby-

And you know what?

He doesn’t hate it.

Sure, you’re a rich bitch- but hey, at least you’ve got the decency to be cute about it. And honestly, the opportunities offered by being your bodyguard- well, he’d be damned if he passed up on a single one.

And that’s how he ended up here, with you all half naked and pressed against him, your panties keeping you from making a sound, completely at his mercy-

Just be quiet okay? You don’t wanna get caught, right?
creator: Dr-Scooby-Sancks
